HGSS.470.0000:
To the north of Lavender is
the Rock Tunnel.\f
Go through it to get to the
Power Plant.
HGSS.470.0001:
There’s a radio show that plays
Poké Flute music.\f
Oh? Ah, your radio needs an EXPN Card
to tune in to it.
HGSS.470.0002:
If the Power Plant isn’t running, the
Magnet Train won’t run either...\f
It also means the Radio Station
can’t broadcast...
HGSS.470.0003:
The Director of the Radio Station
sure was happy.\f
He said they’re back on the air,
because the Power Plant is running\r
smoothly again.
